title: Migrate Payment Gateway to AWS EKS
description: Move payment processing from EC2 to EKS for better auto-scaling and container orchestration. Revision 2 incorporates all CAB-required mitigations from the rev 1 review: staging dry-run completed, InfoSec sign-off received, customer comms templates approved, war room scheduled, enhanced monitoring pre-staged.
rollback_plan: Revert DNS to previous EC2 instances, estimated 8 minutes (improved from 15 min after dry-run). Rollback procedure executed successfully twice in staging on 2026-04-10 and 2026-04-11.
